welcome.title: Welcome to Genius UGC! 🚀
welcome.description: Get up and running in minutes with our step-by-step guide. Create amazing UGC content with the power of AI.

createAccount.title: Create Your Account
createAccount.description: Sign up and verify your email to get started with Genius UGC

exploreCreate.title: Explore the Create Section
exploreCreate.description: Learn how to generate UGC content using our AI-powered tools

manageLibrary.title: Manage Your Library
manageLibrary.description: Organize and access all your generated content in one place

customizeSettings.title: Customize Settings
customizeSettings.description: Personalize your experience and notification preferences

readyToCreate.title: Ready to Create?
readyToCreate.description: Now that you're set up, let's create your first UGC content!

needMoreHelp.title: Need More Help?
needMoreHelp.description: Explore our other resources or contact support

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: How can we help you?
faq.description: Search our knowledge base or browse categories below

changeEmail.q: Can I change my email address?
changeEmail.a: Yes, you can update your email address in your account settings. Go to Account > Settings > Profile Information to make changes.

resetPassword.q: How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.a: Click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email, and we'll send you a password reset link.

contentTypes.q: What types of content can I create?
contentTypes.a: Genius UGC supports creating various types of user-generated content including social media posts, product environment demonstrations, product positionings, and marketing materials using AI-powered tools.

aiGeneration.q: How does the AI content generation work?
aiGeneration.a: Our Genius AI analyzes your input prompts and preferences to generate relevant, high-quality content. You can customize the light, style, and format to match your desire.

editContent.a: For the moment you cannot! We are working on developing the ProduktPix with a goal to become the number one mobile marketing agent in order to quickly and efficiently help people sell their products.

fileFormats.a: We support popular formats including JPG, PNG for images, and various text formats for written content.

paymentMethods.q: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.a: We accept all major credit cards Visa, MasterCard and American Express for your convenience.

cancelSubscription.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
cancelSubscription.a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your billing settings. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period.

refunds.a: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for new subscribers. Contact our support team if you're not satisfied with the service.

usageLimit.q: What happens when I reach my usage limit?
usageLimit.a: When you reach your plan's limit, you can either upgrade to a higher plan or wait for your next billing cycle to reset your usage.

generationTime.q: How long does generating takes to complete?
generationTime.a: Generation times can vary based on complexity and server load. Most content is generated within 30-60 seconds. If you experience longer delays, try refreshing the page.

contentMismatch.q: My generated content doesn't match my request
contentMismatch.a: Try being more specific in your details and audience. Include details about usability, size, niched target audience, and specific requirements for better results.

mobileSupport.q: Can I use the platform on mobile devices?
mobileSupport.a: Yes! Genius UGC is fully responsive and works great on mobile devices, tablets, and desktop computers.

reportBug.q: How do I report a bug or issue?
reportBug.a: You can report bugs through our support contact form or email us directly. Please include details about what you were doing when the issue occurred.

noResults.title: No results found
noResults.description: Try adjusting your search terms or browse all categories

stillNeedHelp.title: Still need help?
stillNeedHelp.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.
